title: March 2026 core update
text:
Released the March 2026 core update 
🔗 https://developers.google.com/search/updates/core-updates. The rollout may take up to 2 weeks to complete.

title: Google On Why Core Updates Take Weeks To Fully Roll Out
text: Google's John Mueller explained, one again, why it takes weeks to roll out a core update.  It is often because there are different components to core updates through the rollout stages, and each needs to be pushed individually....
